{{Quote|In Hutt space the Yuuzhan Vong have had their own way for far too long.|[[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]]|<ref name="Ylesia" />}}
The '''Battle of Ylesia''' was started after the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and [[Chiss Ascendancy/Legends|Chiss Ascendancy]] raided [[Ylesia/Legends|Ylesia]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. A large fleet under [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Traest Kre'fey]] (including several [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] forces, such as the infamous [[Kyp's Dozen]], and the famous [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]]) had been assembled near [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] and spent several months harassing [[Yuuzhan Vong]] weak-points in hit-and-run tactics. [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Kyp Durron]] had received intelligence that the [[Ylesian Republic]], had been assembled on Ylesia, a former [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] slave world.

==Prelude==
{{Quote|If we captured the Brigaders' government, and put them on trial and exiled them to some prison planet, wouldn't that be more of a propaganda coup than simply bombing them?|[[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]]|<ref name="Ylesia" />}}
Durron and Kre'fey had initially wished to blitz the planet and destroy everything as a show of what would happen to collaborators, something they could easily accomplish due to the small size and bad cohesion of the Ylesian garrison. However, [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] proposed capturing the leadership for trial, something to provide a desperately-needed morale boost to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and a way to distract the [[HoloNet/Legends|HoloNet]] from something other than the bad progress of the war.

At the same time, [[Thrackan Sal-Solo]], [[diktat]] of [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] and head of the [[Centerpoint Party]], had been forced by [[Supreme Overlord]] [[Shimrra Jamaane|Shimrra]] to assume the presidency of the Peace Brigade and the [[Ylesian Republic]] in return for Corellia being safeguarded from Yuuzhan Vong attack. A small Yuuzhan Vong force under [[Supreme Commander (Yuuzhan Vong rank)|Supreme Commander]] [[Maal Lah]] had arrived on the world to oversee the Ylesian military, and [[Pwoe]], the claimant [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] of the New Republic, had arrived to negotiate a "peace treaty" between the New Republic and Ylesian Republic.

==The battle==
{{Quote|We transit to the system, engage, win our victory, and leave. If the enemy are too strong, we run without a fight. But with Jacen's idea we'd need transports, drop ships, ground forces. If things go wrong on the ground, we'll take a lot of casualties just getting our people away. If things go wrong above the planet, the forces on the ground may be stranded there.|[[Traest Kre'fey]]|<ref name="Ylesia" />}}
The New Republic force was split into three sections and included [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Interdictor cruisers]] so that enemy ships could not escape. While the Peace Brigade force, mostly composed of a handful of New Republic warships and [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] stolen from earlier battles in the war, was mopped up with few casualties (around half of the New Republic fighter pilots were rookies), [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]] and [[General/Legends|General]] [[Tigran Jamiro/Legends|Tigran Jamiro]] led a ground insertion team into the Ylesian capital, [[Peace City]]. There, they managed to capture the entire [[Ylesian Senate]], including Pwoe and Sal-Solo.

Their escape was halted due to an ambush of [[Warrior caste|Yuuzhan Vong warriors]] and the arrival of a Yuuzhan Vong reinforcement fleet, but [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Jagged Fel]]'s leadership of [[Vanguard Squadron (Hapes)|Vanguard Squadron]] and [[Twin Suns Squadron]] helped evacuate the prisoners and soldiers with a minimum of casualties. The New Republic fleet escaped back to Kashyyyk safely, and the Peace Brigaders were placed on trial.
